final:
module dram_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire enable,
    input wire [15:0] data_in,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    reg [15:0] cell_data;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (enable) begin
            cell_data <= data_in;  // Write data to cell_data
        end
        data_out <= cell_data;    // Read data from cell_data
    end
endmodule
